rationale: Hook moment — 'one conversation with Claude Code' — blast this claim into screen with particle disintegration energy, pure white on void
html: ONE CONVO.

rationale: Revelation — 'content side is only half' — crimson text with upward particle drift, accent color signals importance
html: ONLY HALF.

rationale: 'What's the point if you don't have a pipeline bringing clients?' — particle vortex spiraling inward mirrors the idea of energy going nowhere, text materializes from the void
html: NO PIPELINE.NO CLIENTS.
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=960;var particles=[];for(var i=0;i<550;i++){var a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,r=120+Math.random()*500;particles.push({x:CX+Math.cos(a)*r,y:CY+Math.sin(a)*r,a:a,r:r,speed:0.007+Math.random()*0.018,life:Math.random(),decay:0.003+Math.random()*0.004,size:0.5+Math.random()*2.2,op:0.35+Math.random()*0.45,pull:0.986+Math.random()*0.008});}function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);particles.forEach(function(p){p.a+=p.speed;p.r*=p.pull;p.x=CX+Math.cos(p.a)*p.r;p.y=CY+Math.sin(p.a)*p.r;p.life+=p.decay;var a=p.op*Math.max(0,1-p.life);if(a>0.01){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.size,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1||p.r<25){var na=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,nr=200+Math.random()*500;p.a=na;p.r=nr;p.x=CX+Math.cos(na)*nr;p.y=CY+Math.sin(na)*nr;p.speed=0.007+Math.random()*0.018;p.pull=0.986+Math.random()*0.008;p.life=0;}});requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var txt=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-txt');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:0.7,duration:1.2,ease:'power2.out'}).fromTo(txt,{opacity:0,scale:1.3,filter:'blur(15px)'},{opacity:1,scale:1,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.7,ease:'power2.out'},2.8).to({},{duration:1.3}).to(txt,{opacity:0,scale:0.8,filter:'blur(12px)',duration:0.5,ease:'power2.in'}).to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.8,ease:'power2.in'},'<-0.2');

rationale: 'AI agents handling entire conversations' — comet trails streaming across the frame suggest autonomous velocity, text slides in from the energy wake
html: AI AGENTSrunning the conversation
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920;var comets=[];for(var i=0;i<25;i++){comets.push({x:-(50+Math.random()*300),y:H*0.08+Math.random()*H*0.78,vx:9+Math.random()*14,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*2,tail:40+Math.random()*80,size:1+Math.random()*2.5,op:0.35+Math.random()*0.5,delay:Math.random()*1500,born:false});}var t0=null;function tick(ts){if(!t0)t0=ts;var elapsed=ts-t0;ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);comets.forEach(function(c){if(!c.born){if(elapsed>c.delay)c.born=true;else return;}c.x+=c.vx;c.y+=c.vy;if(c.x>W+100){c.x=-(50+Math.random()*200);c.y=H*0.08+Math.random()*H*0.78;c.vx=9+Math.random()*14;c.vy=(Math.random()-.5)*2;c.tail=40+Math.random()*80;c.size=1+Math.random()*2.5;c.op=0.35+Math.random()*0.5;}var tx=c.x-c.tail;var ty=c.y;var grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(c.x,c.y,tx,ty);grad.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,255,255,'+c.op+')');grad.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,255,255,0)');ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(c.x,c.y);ctx.lineTo(tx,ty);ctx.strokeStyle=grad;ctx.lineWidth=c.size;ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(c.x,c.y,c.size*1.8,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+c.op+')';ctx.fill();});requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var txt=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-txt');var l1=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-l1');var l2=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-l2');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.5,ease:'power2.out'}).fromTo(txt,{opacity:1},{},'0').fromTo(l1,{opacity:0,x:-60,filter:'blur(8px)'},{opacity:1,x:0,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.55,ease:'power3.out'},0.7).fromTo(l2,{opacity:0,y:15},{opacity:1,y:0,duration:0.45,ease:'power2.out'},1.1).to({},{duration:2}).to(l1,{opacity:0,x:60,duration:0.4,ease:'power2.in'}).to(l2,{opacity:0,duration:0.35,ease:'power2.in'},'<').to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.5},'<');

rationale: 'managing over $4 billion in assets' — crimson number counts up from 0 while particle vortex spirals around it, the most impactful social proof moment
html: $0Bin assets managed
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=870;var particles=[];for(var i=0;i<650;i++){var a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,r=80+Math.random()*400;particles.push({a:a,r:r,x:CX+Math.cos(a)*r,y:CY+Math.sin(a)*r,speed:0.009+Math.random()*0.022,life:Math.random(),decay:0.004+Math.random()*0.005,size:0.5+Math.random()*2.5,op:0.4+Math.random()*0.45,pull:0.985+Math.random()*0.009});}function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);particles.forEach(function(p){p.a+=p.speed;p.r*=p.pull;p.x=CX+Math.cos(p.a)*p.r;p.y=CY+Math.sin(p.a)*p.r;p.life+=p.decay;var a=p.op*Math.max(0,1-p.life);if(a>0.01){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.size,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1||p.r<25){var na=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,nr=120+Math.random()*450;p.a=na;p.r=nr;p.x=CX+Math.cos(na)*nr;p.y=CY+Math.sin(na)*nr;p.life=0;}});requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var numEl=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-num');var lbl=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-lbl');var counted=false;el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.6,ease:'power2.out'}).fromTo(lbl,{opacity:0,y:20},{opacity:1,y:0,duration:0.4,ease:'power2.out'},0.3).fromTo(numEl,{opacity:0,scale:1.6,filter:'blur(25px)'},{opacity:1,scale:1,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.55,ease:'power3.out'},0.4).call(function(){if(!counted){counted=true;var obj={v:0};gsap.to(obj,{v:4,duration:1.6,ease:'power2.out',onUpdate:function(){numEl.textContent='$'+obj.v.toFixed(1)+'B';numEl.style.color=obj.v>2?'#cc0000':'#ffffff';numEl.style.textShadow=obj.v>2?'0 0 40px rgba(204,0,0,0.9),0 0 120px rgba(204,0,0,0.4)':'0 0 40px rgba(255,255,255,0.8),0 0 120px rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';}});}},null,0.5).to({},{duration:1.2}).to(numEl,{opacity:0,scale:0.75,duration:0.4,ease:'power2.in'}).to(lbl,{opacity:0,duration:0.35,ease:'power2.in'},'<').to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.5},'<');

rationale: '20 plus partners across our network' — particles converge from edges toward center as numbers coalesce, closing the video with gravitational weight
html:
20+network partners
Link in bio
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=880;function makeParticle(){var a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,r=400+Math.random()*550;return{x:CX+Math.cos(a)*r,y:CY+Math.sin(a)*r,tx:CX+(Math.random()-.5)*300,ty:CY+(Math.random()-.5)*300,life:0,decay:0.003+Math.random()*0.005,size:0.5+Math.random()*2.2,op:0.5+Math.random()*0.4};}var particles=[];for(var i=0;i<550;i++)particles.push(makeParticle());function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);particles.forEach(function(p){p.x+=(p.tx-p.x)*0.025;p.y+=(p.ty-p.y)*0.025;p.life+=p.decay;var phase=Math.min(1,p.life*5)*Math.max(0,1-(Math.max(0,p.life-0.6)/0.4));var a=p.op*phase;if(a>0.01){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.size,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1.1){var np=makeParticle();p.x=np.x;p.y=np.y;p.tx=np.tx;p.ty=np.ty;p.life=0;p.decay=np.decay;p.size=np.size;p.op=np.op;}});requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var numEl=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-num');var lbl=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-lbl');var cta=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cta');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.9,ease:'power2.out'}).fromTo(numEl,{opacity:0,scale:2,filter:'blur(35px)'},{opacity:1,scale:1,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.65,ease:'power3.out'},0.6).fromTo(lbl,{opacity:0,y:20},{opacity:1,y:0,duration:0.5,ease:'power2.out'},1.1).fromTo(cta,{opacity:0,y:25,scale:0.88},{opacity:1,y:0,scale:1,duration:0.6,ease:'back.out(1.7)'},1.6).to({},{duration:1.3}).to(numEl,{opacity:0,scale:0.8,duration:0.45,ease:'power2.in'}).to(lbl,{opacity:0,duration:0.4,ease:'power2.in'},'<').to(cta,{opacity:0,scale:0.92,duration:0.4,ease:'power2.in'},'<').to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.6},'<');
